policy_metadata.rationale: Freeze a transparent utility score before B0-B6 experiments so lambdas cannot be adjusted after seeing results.
policy_metadata.intended_effect: Compare return, drawdown, turnover, tracking error, worst-window, dispersion, cost drag and signal robustness in one auditable score.
policy_metadata.validation_evidence: Planned validation: focused contract tests plus first B0/B1 mini-backfill review before any full-backfill admission.
policy_metadata.review_condition: Review after B0-B3 mini-backfill or if owner changes risk/cost priorities before experiment execution.

utility_formula: net_return_proxy * 1.0 - drawdown_penalty * 0.75 - turnover_penalty * 0.25 - tracking_error_penalty * 0.20 - worst_window_penalty * 0.50 - window_dispersion_penalty * 0.25 - cost_drag * 1.0 - signal_robustness_penalty * 0.50

lambda_parameters.rationale: Anchor score in net return proxy after costs.
Drawdown is a core risk objective but should not mechanically dominate all return evidence in pilot mini-backfill.
Turnover is penalized separately from cost drag to expose churn even when cost assumptions are low.
Tracking error matters for benchmark-relative interpretation but remains secondary to hard stress/cost gates.
Worst-window weakness must reduce utility so average return cannot hide fragile windows.
Window dispersion is a pilot stability penalty, separate from hard FRAGILE gate.
Cost drag is directly subtracted from net utility.
Signal robustness problems reduce utility and BLOCKED status remains a hard stop.

rules: Parameters are frozen before experiment execution.
Risk overlay and alpha allocator may use separate scorecards only if declared before results.
UTILITY_IMPROVED cannot override hard stops for data quality, stress, cost/benchmark, signal robustness or window fragility.

reader_brief.summary: 统一 portfolio utility scorecard 已冻结为 pilot baseline，lambda 调整不得发生在看到结果之后。
reader_brief.blocking_issues: B1 mini-backfill produced mixed evidence; later runners still need independent score components and signal robustness evidence.
reader_brief.warnings: Pilot lambdas are policy assumptions, not calibrated investment truths; B1 mixed evidence does not authorize lambda changes.
reader_brief.next_action: review B1 mixed evidence without changing frozen lambdas
